# BIAS LAB — AI Fairness & Integrity Platform

## What is BIAS LAB?
BIAS LAB is an AI fairness assurance platform. It audits, explains, and mitigates demographic bias in machine learning models used for decision-making (loan approvals, hiring, admissions, etc.).

## Key Capabilities
- Data audit: demographic representation analysis, missing data detection
- Proxy feature detection: identifies features correlated with protected attributes
- Model bias analysis: demographic parity, equal opportunity metrics
- SHAP explainability: per-record explanations for rejected decisions
- Counterfactual testing: flip sensitive attributes to measure decision changes
- Stress testing: model fragility under distribution shift and noise
- Auto-fix recommendations: threshold tuning, feature dropping, SMOTE

## Target Audience
- Data science teams building ML models for high-stakes decisions
- Compliance/legal teams needing audit trails for AI fairness regulations
- Enterprise AI/ML platform teams

## Technical Stack
- Frontend: React 18, TypeScript, Vite, Three.js, Framer Motion
- Backend: Python FastAPI, scikit-learn, XGBoost, fairlearn, SHAP
- Database: SQLite via SQLAlchemy

## Links
- Homepage: https://biaslab.dev
- Documentation: https://github.com/anomalyco/BIAS-0
